page_content:
CPSP379 Advanced Practicum: Study Abroad (1-3 Credits)

Advanced, supervised study-abroad experience.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program; or permission of UGST-College Park Scholars.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.

CPSP386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits)

CPSP388 Advanced Special Topics in College Park Scholars (1-3 Credits) Interdisciplinary topics of special interest to College Park Scholars, such as legacies of the cold war, environmental ethics, women in leadership, and other timely issues. Projects build on previous work in College Park Scholars.
